name: StageDefinitions
description: Reference/config data: the ordered list of program stages for each track. Not client-scoped (no PII; readable by all authenticated users). StageMilestones reference these. Descriptions are DRAFT (UCF to refine).

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: order
columns.description: 1-based order of this stage within its track

columns.name: description
columns.description: Short stage description (DRAFT — UCF to refine)
